name: Number 39: Utopia the Envoy of Light
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>３９ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>光</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひかり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>使</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>希</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>望</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぼう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>皇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ホープ
name_jp_rom: Nanbāzu Sanjūkyū Hikari no Shisha Kibōō Hōpu
name_jp_tl: Numbers 39: Envoy of Light - King of Wishes, Hope
desc:
2 Level 4 monsters
Cannot be destroyed by battle, except with a "Number" monster. (Quick Effect): You can detach 1 material from this card, then target 1 monster you control; the first time it would be destroyed by battle or card effect this turn, it is not destroyed. When the second attack of this turn is declared: You can make this card gain 2500 ATK, and if you do, it gains this effect.
● When this card destroys a monster by battle and sends it to the GY: You can Special Summon it to your field.

mst: Prevents other cards being destroyed by card effects
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your field
